text_block_list.text:
Special Week asks me to come to the trainer's
office on Valentine's Day.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer! You came!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
It's Valentine's Day today, so I made you some
chocolate!

I look over at the desk to find something huge
and imposing sitting on it.
choice_data_list: Is that... an actual mountain of chocolates?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
My mom always used to tell me, "Cooking is love!
And you don't skimp on love!"

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I jam-packed all my gratitude for you into them!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I actually wanted to make you enough chocolate
to get full off of, but I was advised against it.

Frankly, I'm shocked by the implication that
Special Week can finish all the chocolate before
us and still have room for more.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Let me know if this isn't enough! I can make you
as much as you want.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
This is to repay you for everything you always do
for me, so feel free to ask for more!
choice_data_list: Th-thanks... Down the hatch it goes.

text_block_list.text:
I manage to conquer Special Week's chocolate
mountain through sheer willpower.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe! Looks like you enjoyed the chocolates.
Thank goodness!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I know! How about I make you some more? I've
still got ingredients left!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Gahhh! Trainer?! Are you okay?!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Please, open your eyes! Trainerrrr!

And that's lights out for Valentine's Day with
Special Week.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
...Um, Trainer? Could you try some of the
chocolate now?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I made sure to sample them when I was cooking,
but I can always remake them if you don't like
them!
choice_data_list: You don't have to. They're very tasty.
You don't have to. They're very tasty.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Really?! Thank goodness!

Special Week's stomach grumbles after her
exclamation of relief.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
S-sorry! Watching you eat has made me all hungry
too...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I thought you'd never ask! Yaaay! ♪

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Nom.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Food tastes twice as good when you eat it with a
friend!
choice_data_list: Is that what your mom used to say too?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Nope! I was just thinking that. It's true, though! ♪

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ehehe! ♪ Happy Valentine's Day, Trainer!

Special Week and I spend a heartwarming
Valentine's Day together.
